popularStory.headline: Otto de Maurienne (d 1060) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Count of Maurienne, 1030; Marquis of Susa.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SAVOY.htm#Oddondied1060B, as of 10/29/2014
ODDON de Maurienne, son of HUMBERT Comte de Maurienne & his wife Au …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Oddone di Savoia於1020年出生在吉艾福吉艾福時，他的父親Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia41歲，母親Ancilla von Lenzburg36歲。他於大約1046年與Adelaide di Susa在吉艾福吉艾福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1060年3月3日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利享年40歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Savoia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

variants.name: Savoie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Oddone di Savoia was born in 1020, in Geneva, Geneva, his father, Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia, was 41 and his mother, Ancilla von Lenzburg, was 36. He married Adelaide di Susa about 1046, in Geneva, Geneva. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 March 1060, in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Turin, Turin, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Oddone di Savoia est né en 1020, à Genève, Genève, son père, Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ancilla von Lenzburg, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide di Susa environ 1046, à Genève, Genève. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1060, à Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Oddone di Savoia 1020 in Genève, Genf geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia 41 und seine Mutter Ancilla von Lenzburg 36. Er hat um 1046 in Genève, Genf Adelaide di Susa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. März 1060 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Turin, Torino, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

Lui sposato Adelaide di Susa circa 1046, nel Genève, Ginevra. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1060, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Oddone di Savoiaが1020年にジェンeブジェンeブで生まれた時，父Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoiaは41歳，母Ancilla von Lenzburgは36歳であった。約1046年にジェンeブジェンeブでAdelaide di Susaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1060年3月3日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで40歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントトリノトリノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Oddone di Savoia(이)가 1020년 e브 e브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ancilla von Lenzburg(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1046년 e브 e브에서 Adelaide di Susa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1060년 3월 3일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 토리노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Oddone di Savoia nasceu em 1020, em Genève, Genève, seu pai, Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ancilla von Lenzburg, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide di Susa aproximadamente 1046, em Genève, Genève. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1060, em Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Oddone di Savoia родился в 1020 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв, его отцу по имени Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ancilla von Lenzburg, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide di Susa около 1046 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 марта 1060 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности торино, торино, пиемонт, Италия.

Se casó con Adelaide di Susa aproximadamente 1046, en Genève, Genève. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1060, en Chambéry, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia.
